---
title: "Mia B. Franco"
image: pic2.jpg
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mia-franco-a39bb853
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/miafranco367
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:m.franco@colostate.edu
---

Mia B. Franco is a graduate student in Forest Sciences at Colorado State University, Fort Collins.

Education:

Experience:
